formulas.finalDays: roundingMode == 0 ? rawDays : roundingMode == 1 ? Math.round(rawDays * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision) : roundingMode == 2 ? Math.floor(rawDays * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision) : Math.ceil(rawDays * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision)
